notice: GENERATED CODE - DO NOT MODIFY BY HAND.

feature.name: Host Organizer Create
feature.description: Orchestrates the host organizer-creation wizard, local draft recovery, media and organizer-default choices, submission, and route dismissal.

actionScope.included: Wizard navigation; organizer type, city, cover/profile media, Host defaults, and Event Success defaults; local draft save and recovery; organizer submission; and route dismissal.
excluded: Raw text-field edits are form data governed by CatchField, form validators, and organizer data contracts rather than separately cardinalized actions.
Automatic initial draft loading, submit-success draft deletion, and submit-success route closure are lifecycle effects rather than user actions.
Launching organizer creation from Host Home or Host Organizers retains the source feature's navigation ownership; post-create organizer administration retains Host Organizer Detail ownership.

actions.description: Moves to the preceding wizard step, or dismisses the route from the first step.
Validates the current wizard step and advances only when its form rules pass.
Selects ordered organizer cover photos up to the remaining media limit.
Selects or replaces the organizer profile image.
Removes one locally selected organizer cover photo.
Reorders selected cover photos and therefore changes the primary cover.
Selects the organizer market used for location and currency defaults.
Selects one organizer type from the finite OrganizerType domain.
Updates the organizer's reusable host and Event Success defaults as one compound configuration.
Persists the non-empty organizer draft for the signed-in host.
Retries loading the signed-in host's local organizer draft after a load failure.
Creates the organizer, uploads selected media, clears the saved draft, and lets the success transition close the caller route.

evidenceExceptions.reason: These lifecycle or permission transitions are implemented but do not yet have deterministic image-capture evidence registered by the screen authority.
These deterministic organizer-create states have Widgetbook/capture evidence where visual and no focused state-level automated test recorded by the screen authority yet.
